save.description: Claude Self-Logging with optional tmux dialog monitoring

source_format.rule: Always use '3.0 (quilt)' for packages with debian revisions (e.g., 0.3.4-jammy1)
source_format.problem: Native format '3.0 (native)' cannot have debian revisions

orig_tarball.rule: Meta packages need orig.tar.gz even if minimal
orig_tarball.solution: Create minimal tarball with dummy content for meta packages

newlines.rule: All debian/ files must end with newline

version_conflicts.rule: Clean up old changelog entries when renaming packages
version_conflicts.problem: dch refuses to create 'lower' versions (jammy1 after noble1)
version_conflicts.solution: Reset changelog to clean base version before building

package_renaming.rule: When renaming source packages, update ALL references

environment_setup.rule: Always set DEBEMAIL and EMAIL environment variables
environment_setup.solution: export DEBEMAIL='team@collective-context.org' && export DEBFULLNAME='Collective Context Team'
environment_setup.automated_fix: Set in build scripts or global config

interactive_prompts.rule: Avoid interactive prompts in automated builds
common_prompts: dch: Did you see those 2 warnings? Press RETURN to continue...
solutions: Use debuild -d flag to ignore build dependencies

file_permissions.rule: Ensure correct permissions for debian files

duplicate_upload_prevention.rule: CRITICAL: Always check if packages already exist on Launchpad before upload
duplicate_upload_prevention.problem: Uploading duplicate packages causes Launchpad rejection emails and violates system rules
duplicate_upload_prevention.solution: Scrape PPA page to verify package versions don't already exist
duplicate_upload_prevention.implementation: check_ppa_for_duplicates() function in professional build system
duplicate_upload_prevention.check_method: Search for 'ccc VERSION-CODENAME' in PPA page text
duplicate_upload_prevention.failure_action: STOP upload process immediately if duplicates found
duplicate_upload_prevention.user_feedback: Hier hättest dun nach unseren Vorgaben keinen zweiten Uplaod starten dürfen
duplicate_upload_prevention.lesson_learned: 2025-09-19: Noble package was uploaded twice, received Launchpad rejection email

orig_tarball_consistency.rule: CRITICAL: All distributions must use IDENTICAL orig.tar.gz with same checksums
orig_tarball_consistency.problem: Different orig.tar.gz files for same version cause Launchpad rejection
orig_tarball_consistency.launchpad_error: File ccc_0.3.4.orig.tar.gz already exists in Collective Context Commander - Ubuntu packages, but uploaded version has different contents
orig_tarball_consistency.root_cause: Different timestamps in debian/changelog create different orig.tar.gz checksums
orig_tarball_consistency.solution: Create orig.tar.gz ONCE and use fixed timestamp for all distributions
orig_tarball_consistency.implementation: Move orig.tar.gz to packaging directory before building distributions
orig_tarball_consistency.lesson_learned: 2025-09-19: Jammy package rejected due to different orig.tar.gz checksums

technical_details.difference: 1402 bytes caused by different changelog timestamps

successful_fix_verification.status: Both packages successfully built and ready for upload

professional_build_system.rule: Use comprehensive professional build system for all PPA operations

critical_fixes.timezone_handling: Set TZ=Europe/Berlin and use time.tzset() for proper timestamps
critical_fixes.debuild_location: Copy orig.tar.gz to parent directory for debuild access
critical_fixes.non_interactive: Use debuild -d flag to avoid interactive prompts

dependency_requirements.python3_bs4: Required for PPA duplicate checking (sudo apt install python3-bs4)
dependency_requirements.note: System will continue without bs4 but with warning

gpg_signing_status.workaround: Continue with unsigned packages, use existing signing system
gpg_signing_status.fallback: Manual signing works with existing ccc upload ppa ccc command

professional_build_system.success_criteria: Both jammy and noble packages built with identical checksums and duplicate prevention working

upgrade_process: 1. Update base version in all source files
2. Update build scripts with new version

multi_distribution_builds.rule: Both base and meta packages must build for ALL supported Ubuntu distributions
multi_distribution_builds.pattern: Use build functions that iterate through distribution list
critical_steps: 1. Create clean build directory between distributions
2. Reset debian/changelog for each distribution using dch
4. Move build artifacts to parent directory after each build
5. Verify all .changes files exist before upload
multi_distribution_builds.common_mistake: Building only ubuntu1 instead of jammy1 + noble1 versions
